title: ThresholdBlockSize Property
description: Sets the size of the square pixel neighborhood used to calculate mean intensity for a given pixel.
notes:
ThresholdBlockSize is the size of the square pixel neighborhood used to calculate mean intensity for a given pixel.  This corresponds to the parameter "s" in the Bradley paper.  In RC+ we offer the user an enumerated choice of options as a fraction ROI width.  That is: ¼ ROI, 1/8 ROI, 1/16 ROI, /1/32 ROI, 1/64 ROI.  The default value of 1/16 ROI works well for most situations.

See Also: ThresholdBlockSize Property

ThresholdLevel Property
